aligned_lyrics.text: That cracked bench where we used to sit
You would kick that broken curb
Now it's just my quiet steps
Same cheap coffee in that paper cup
근데 난 누구야 now that we’re done
Same slow trains and rusted trucks
Same blue sky over the same old dust
Your window still has that crooked blind
I slow down at every light
왜 자꾸 네 집 앞에서 숨을 꾹 참아
We were kids with plastic crowns
Promised more than we could keep
Now my name inside your phone
Or did you clean me out
Same cheap coffee in that paper cup
근데 난 누구야 now that we’re done
Same slow trains and rusted trucks
Same blue sky over the same old dust
